title: Synthesizing large memory blocks takes a really long time.

features.name: large unpacked memory array declaration
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked memory array declaration with depth exceeding 65536 entries

features.name: multiple conditional writes to memory via different addresses
features.description: Code should include multiple conditional write operations to the same memory array using different address inputs
features.snippet:
if (we) mem[write_addr] <= write_data;
if (oob_wen) mem[oob_write_addr] <= oob_write_data;

features.name: combinational read from memory via address index
features.description: Code should include a combinational read from a large memory array using address indexing
